name: lpfirst-stats-tracker
description: Scraper and dashboard for ContractorConnection stats

scripts.update: npm run decrypt && npm run scrape:daily && npm run encrypt:data
scripts.update:cc: npm run decrypt && npm run scrape:cc && npm run encrypt:data
scripts.update:sedgwick: npm run decrypt && npm run scrape:sedgwick && npm run encrypt:data
scripts.update:alacrity: npm run decrypt && npm run scrape:alacrity && npm run encrypt:data
scripts.update:icon: npm run decrypt && npm run scrape:icon && npm run encrypt:data
scripts.update:initial: npm run scrape:initial && npm run encrypt

author: Kevin Colten
